title: Writing Environmental Essays
description: Structuring essays about climate, biodiversity, ocean health.
summary_pt_br: Ensaio ambiental: enquadrar crise, evidência, stakeholders, ação. Voz passiva para autoridade.

scenes.subtitle_en: Structuring essays about climate, biodiversity, ocean health.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Ensaio ambiental: enquadrar crise, evidência, stakeholders, ação. Voz passiva para autoridade.

scenes.text_en: Structuring essays about climate, biodiversity, ocean health. Focus: writing environmental essays. Coral reefs are being bleached at unprecedented rates.
scenes.text_pt: Ensaio ambiental: enquadrar crise, evidência, stakeholders, ação. Voz passiva para autoridade. Foco: writing environmental essays. Recifes de coral estão sendo branqueados em ritmo sem precedentes.

scenes.title: Writing Environmental Essays
scenes.body_en: Environmental essay structure: frame the crisis, present evidence, introduce stakeholders, propose action. Use passive voice for impersonal authority.
scenes.body_pt: Ensaio ambiental: enquadrar crise, evidência, stakeholders, ação. Voz passiva para autoridade.

examples.en: Coral reefs are being bleached at unprecedented rates.
examples.pt: Recifes de coral estão sendo branqueados em ritmo sem precedentes.

examples.en: Policy change must be informed by scientific consensus.
examples.pt: Mudanças políticas devem ser informadas pelo consenso científico.

examples.en: Local communities bear the earliest costs of climate shifts.
examples.pt: Comunidades locais arcam com os primeiros custos.

exercise.question: Complete: "Coral reefs are being bleached at ___ rates."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "Coral reefs are being bleached at unprecedented rates."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Recifes de coral estão sendo branqueados em ritmo sem precedentes.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
Policy change must be informed by scientific consensus.
exercise.explanation: Correct: "Policy change must be informed by scientific consensus."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Mudanças políticas devem ser informadas pelo consenso científico.

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Writing Environmental Essays — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre writing environmental essays. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Bia, frame your essay's crisis in one sentence.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Our reefs are bleaching faster than science predicted.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Fishing communities, tourism, and marine scientists.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Regional marine protected areas expanded by 30%.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: My generation inherits this choice, for good or worse.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Environmental essays need data and conviction.

scenes.title: The ocean essay
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Summarize Bia's essay structure. Use at least three environmental terms.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: At a student environmental summit, Bia presented the draft of an essay she would submit to a national competition.

paragraphs.speaker: Bia
paragraphs.en: Coral reefs are being bleached at unprecedented rates, and consensus among marine scientists is alarming.

paragraphs.speaker: Judge
paragraphs.en: Your evidence is strong. Who are the stakeholders you believe the policy must center?

paragraphs.speaker: Bia
paragraphs.en: Fishing communities, local tourism, and indigenous populations bear the earliest and sharpest costs.

paragraphs.speaker: Judge
paragraphs.en: Your proposed mitigation — expanded marine protected areas — is concrete and politically viable.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Environmental writing, Bia believed, was never about despair — it was about handing readers the levers they already had.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Writing Environmental Essays". Structuring essays about climate, biodiversity, ocean health. Coral reefs are being bleached at unprecedented rates. Policy change must be informed by scientific consensus. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Writing Environmental Essays". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
check.explanation: She says the title: "Writing Environmental Essays".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Writing Environmental Essays".

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
